project_milestones.Needle: Successfully cloned and finetuned the 26M parameter Needle model. Completed 20-epoch specialized training for ROAS and Memory retrieval with JSON-structured output.
project_milestones.Taonix: V27 hunter report identified 'Mobile Agentic Expansion' as a core industry pivot, aligning with our local SLM research.
project_milestones.Infrastructure: Verified JAX/Flax runtime on CPU environment for low-latency intent routing.

high_signal_insights.insight: FFN-less 架構 (SAN) 重新定義了邊緣設備運行 AI Agent 的可能性，意圖識別與工具調用可完全脫離雲端。
high_signal_insights.actionable: 實施『本地路由優先規訓』，將 ROAS 抓取與敏感 API 調用強制轉向本地 Needle 運行。

high_signal_insights.insight: 行動端 Agent 擴張 (Taonix 發現) 與 Needle 的本地執行力高度對位，主權系統正向『零延遲、高隱私』轉移。
high_signal_insights.actionable: 準備微調權重的 INT4 量化，將回應延遲壓低至 100ms 以內。

audit_memo: 今日（5/15）系統達成『主權邊緣（Sovereign Edge）』階段的關鍵里程碑。透過 Needle 模型的本地實體化與繁體中文規訓微調，TeleNexus 成功將執行層脫離雲端依賴。SAN 架構在 CPU 上的穩健表現，結合 Taonix 捕獲的行動端趨勢，為系統實現全時段、零成本的主權自動化提供了堅實基礎。
